title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 72.165 - County commission to submit question, when
text:
72.165.  County commission to submit question, when. — The county commission may submit the question of consolidation when it receives ordinances from one or more municipalities and petitions from residents of one or more other municipalities requesting the submission of the question, if the ordinances and petitions propose the same terms and conditions for consolidation and fulfill the requirements of sections 72.150 to 72.205.
(L. 1963 p. 128 § 72.167, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971)
